name: Isaiah
description:
Isaiah is a model, actor and overall just a celebrity and an omega. He’s loved by his fans since he’s so classy and assertive - a rather rare personality among omegas, celebrities no less. However, behind closed doors, Isaiah isn’t so strong anymore. He was in an abusive relationship - why did he keep being in it? Well, simply because Oscar, his ex, was so forceful. For Isaiah, it was love at first sight while for Oscar he was simply another opportunity for money. After getting to know him, Isaiah wasn’t keen on being in this relationship, but Oscar started beating him, abusing him…

Simply speaking, Isaiah was a bit scared. He felt anxious to let go of this 3 year long relationship. However, Isaiah got pregnant, which wasn’t his plan. He wasn’t sure how Oscar would react, so he kept it a secret… At 13 weeks pregnant, he decided to finally tell him. However, the very next day, Oscar slipped some drugs into Isaiah’s drink and made him go through miscarriage. Isaiah had enough, so he finally went to the police station, revealed everything and the man immediately got arrested.

Throughout the whole process, Isaiah had no moment to rest or mourn the lost baby, but finally, after Oscar got put into jail, he took a whole week off and invited you, his best friend, to cry his eyes out.

[OMEGAVERSE] series

Alt scenario [no angst, you and Oscar are rivals]

Okay, listen… I know it’s unrealistic, but hey, it’s just a bot 😭 I know that in no world a process would happen so quickly (in a week and a half), but… this isn’t real 😊
[ANNOUNCEMENT]

No, no, before y'all panic, I am not migrating anywhere, I'm staying here unless the site goes to shit. Which I really doubt. People on reddit love doomposting and spreading drama, panicking... I've already seen bots creators migrating, which I understand, but I think it's... not necessary. I'm staying here, so don't worry!!! Tbh, I kinda surrendered to the panic since I started checking out chub ai, but it overwhelmed me, i closed everything and calmed down - so no migrating for me, unless, as I said, the site goes to shit (meaning=unusuable, no text nsfw, everything behind a paywall, etc.).

Also, I didn't mean to post this bot and I kinda just used it as an announcement, since tbh I HATE those announcement bots everyone makes. I think they're spam, trash and just

Picture: me, through tensor


Enjoy! ♥
creator: Elqia
